articles.title: Apple’s iOS 27 Hints at Foldable iPhone
articles.description: iOS 27 reveals features for Apple's upcoming foldable iPhone, showcasing folding hardware and enhancements for flexible displays.
articles.impact: Apple's foldable iPhone could reshape the market.

articles.title: Top 5 Features of iOS 27 Beta
articles.description: The iOS 27 beta impresses with Liquid Glass improvements and a new extra-large widget option, enhancing user experience.
articles.impact: iOS 27 beta sets a new standard for usability.

articles.title: Xbox Employee Denies PS5 Gears of War Rumor
articles.description: An Xbox employee refutes claims about a PS5 logo for Gears of War, asserting the information is false.
articles.impact: Clarification helps maintain Xbox's brand integrity.

articles.title: iOS 27 Revamps AirPods Settings
articles.description: The iOS 27 beta introduces a significant redesign of AirPods settings, enhancing user accessibility and functionality.

articles.title: Apple Launches watchOS 27 with Siri AI
articles.description: watchOS 27 features Siri AI integration, a dynamic app grid, and enhanced health tracking capabilities for newer Apple Watch models.
articles.impact: watchOS 27 enhances user interaction and health monitoring.

articles.title: Google NotebookLM Upgrades with Gemini 3.5
articles.description: NotebookLM receives a major upgrade with Gemini 3.5 and Antigravity features, currently available for AI Ultra and enterprise accounts only.
articles.impact: Upgrade enhances AI capabilities for enterprise users.

articles.title: macOS 27 'Golden Gate' Introduces Liquid Glass
articles.description: macOS 27 'Golden Gate' features more Liquid Glass enhancements and an updated Siri, improving user experience across devices.
